mano_cua.result_summary: 部署失败：unplugin-icons是Vite插件库，需先npm run build构建后才能运行示例。但build脚本依赖esno/tsx，tsx 3.14与Node 18不兼容（Error: tsx must be loaded with --import instead of --loader）。插件构建失败导致example:dev无法启动（Cannot find module dist/vite.cjs）。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Plugin library project that requires building before examples can run. Build script uses esno/tsx which has Node 18 compatibility issues. Cannot build the plugin, cannot run the example.
